meaning: n. 高度自制者,坚忍克己之人 Stoic 斯多葛学派哲学家
examples: The kids of Kobe try to be as stoic as their parents in this tragic situation.
The individual who promoted this idea was a Stoic philosopher.
We've had Lincoln as manic-depressive, the business sage, and the stoic philosopher.
Slowly, we are seeing signs that this stoic trend in returning veterans is beginning to change.
At present there seems to be plenty of enigmatic wisdom couched in stoic silence.
